---
title: "<span class='lang-pt'>Teses e Dissertações</span><span class='lang-en'>Theses &amp; Dissertations</span>"
description-meta: "Banco de teses e dissertações orientadas"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: doutorado
    contents: theses.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: false
    template: theses-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Doutorado"

  - id: mestrado
    contents: theses.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: false
    template: theses-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Mestrado"
css: ../papers/pub-listing.css
filters: [remove-stray-divfence.lua]
---

## <span class="lang-pt">Teses de Doutorado</span><span class="lang-en">Doctoral Theses</span>

::: {#doutorado}

:::

## <span class="lang-pt">Dissertações de Mestrado</span><span class="lang-en">Master&apos;s Theses</span>

::: {#mestrado}

:::

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
